title: 阿根廷官宣1人因伤退出世界杯 递补名单2选1谁是幸运儿_搜狐网
original_text:
北京时间6月7日，阿根廷国家队官方公告，已入选2026美加墨世界杯26人正式名单的后卫莱昂纳多-巴莱尔迪右腿比目鱼肌出现肌肉伤势，因伤退出本届世界杯。
阿根廷国家队官方公告表示：“祝他打起精神，保重身体，早日康复！”
有报道称，巴莱尔迪的伤势将缺阵至少15天，也就是说他最早有可能在对阵约旦的小组赛最后一轮中复出，但阿根廷教练组在经过慎重考虑后，还是决定补招新球员。
斯卡洛尼将在初选名单55人中为巴莱尔迪寻找替代者，有消息称最有可能的替补者是塞内西，2022冠军成员阿库尼亚也有机会。
#阿根廷官宣一人伤退
#递补名单2选1

Read the Full Text
Every guide links to free, legal versions of the complete original work — accessible on any device.
What types of literature guides do you offer?
We offer comprehensive literature study guides for 62+ essential works across every major genre: classic novels (Austen, Dickens, the Brontës), Shakespearean plays (Hamlet, Macbeth, King Lear), dystopian fiction (1984, Brave New World, The Handmaid's Tale), Gothic literature (Frankenstein, Dracula), epic poetry (The Odyssey, The Iliad), and modern literary fiction (The Great Gatsby, Beloved, The Kite Runner). Each guide includes chapter-by-chapter summaries, color-coded theme analysis, detailed character breakdowns, and expert quote explanations.
Are the guides suitable for students and teachers?
Absolutely. Every literature guide is designed to support academic study — use the chapter summaries to track plot development, the theme analysis to identify recurring motifs and prepare for essays, the character breakdowns to understand key figures and their motivations, and the quote explanations to build evidence for literary arguments. Teachers use our guides as supplementary classroom resources.
Can I read the full book for free?
Yes. Every literature guide includes direct links to free, legal versions of the complete original text through Project Gutenberg and Internet Archive. You can read the full book online at no cost — our guide helps you understand it better.
Which authors and works are covered?
Our collection spans centuries of English and world literature: from Homer, Sophocles, and Shakespeare through Austen, Dickens, the Brontës, Dostoevsky, Tolstoy, and Melville to Orwell, Fitzgerald, Steinbeck, Morrison, Atwood, and beyond. We cover works frequently assigned in high school and college English courses as well as titles chosen by avid readers.
